title: Upon Julia's Hair Filled With Dew
content:
Dew sate on Julia's hair,
And spangled too,
Like leaves that laden are
With trembling dew;
Or glitter'd to my sight,
As when the beams
Have their reflected light
Danced by the streams.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Julia's Hair Filled With Dew"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
